Series B Funding Term Sheet

Date: 15 October 2023

Parties: 
1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC: S7654321L
2. QuantumLeap Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: 201912345A
3. Horizon Ventures Fund, Contact: +65 6123 4567, Email: investments@horizonfund.sg

Investment Amount: SGD 10,000,000

Valuation: Pre-money valuation of SGD 50,000,000

Share Price: SGD 1.25 per share

Board Composition: Horizon Ventures Fund entitled to appoint one director

Use of Proceeds: Expansion into Southeast Asian markets

Closing Date: 30 November 2023

Note: This term sheet is non-binding and for discussion purposes only.
